---
title: "Elder (Sambucus nigra)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Adoxaceae](/trees/family/adoxaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Sambucus*](/trees/genus/sambucus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 367 — Elder](../367.html) |  |
| [Tree 383 — Elder](../383.html) |  |
